title: fix: restore gen production edge rate limiter
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Restores the production `EDGE_RATE_LIMITER` binding removed during the incident.
- Keeps staging/test rate limiter config unchanged.
- Leaves custom-domain routing changes untouched.

gist.headline: Restoring the speed limits
gist.blurb: We've restored the edge rate limiter for our text generation API to keep the hive running smoothly and protect against traffic spikes.
gist.summary: Restored the production EDGE_RATE_LIMITER binding in the gen.pollinations.ai Cloudflare Worker configuration following a recent incident.
gist.impact: This ensures the text generation API remains stable and protected from excessive traffic spikes without affecting custom-domain routing.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot setting up a glowing speed limit sign or toll booth next to a stream of data, representing the restored edge rate limiter.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-headed robot setting up a glowing lime green (#ecf874) speed limit sign next to a flowing stream of digital data. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-headed robot setting up a glowing lime green (#ecf874) speed limit sign next to a flowing stream of digital data.
